Name: Puddlipup
Ability Description: Active: Happily chow down on dessert! After eating, gains 420% (MP) Shield for 8s.
Rank 1: Shield Strength increases to 485% MP.
Rank 2: After using its Active Skill, Puddlipup's Armor and MR gain an additional 40% while the Shield exists.
Rank 4: Shield Strength increases to 550% MP.
Rank 6: Gain Passive Skill: Can be triggered once per battle: When Fatal Damage is received, trigger Springy Pudding.

Name: Taileep
Ability Description: Active: Moves to a safe position 2 hexes from the target of attack. Passive: Taleep's Basic Attack attacks both the target and another opponent within 1 hex of them at the same time.
Rank 1: DMG dealt by its Basic Attack increases by 15%.
Rank 2: The Active Skill grants 200% Shield for 5s.
Rank 4: DMG dealt by its Basic Attack increases to 30%.
Rank 6: Increases Attack SPD by 50% while Shielded.

Name: Batnyss
Ability Description: Active: Unleashes a sleepwave in the direction of the most opponents, dealing 230% (ATK) Physical DMG and stunning the first opponent hit by the sleepwave for 1s. The sleepwave's DMG decreases after hitting each opponent, down to a minimum of 40% of its initial DMG.
Rank 1: Physical DMG dealt by the sleepwave increases to 275% ATK.
Rank 2: The first opponent hit by Sleep Wave is Stunned for 2s.
Rank 4: Physical DMG dealt by the sleepwave increases to 320% ATK.
Rank 6: Sleepwaves additionally deal 100% ATK as True DMG.

Name: Bunmareen
Ability Description: Active: Creates a Nexus Ward that lasts 3s. The Nexus Ward shatters after 3s, dealing 250% (MP) Magic DMG to opponents within 1 hex.
Rank 1: Health increases by 12%.
Rank 2: While the Nexus Ward exists, Bunmareen heals over time for 300 Health.
Rank 4: The Magic DMG dealt after the Nexus Ward shatters increases to 300% MP.
Rank 6: Bunmareen's healing while the Nexus Ward exists increases to 450.

Name: Inkifoal
Ability Description: Active: Inkifoal leaps, healing itself over time for a total of 30% (HP) Health.
Rank 1: Health increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Additional effect: Gains 30 Armor and MR after using its Active Skill.
Rank 4: The Active Skill's Healing increases to 40%.
Rank 6: The Armor and MR granted by the Active Skill increases to 60.

Name: Cumulon
Ability Description: Active: Unleashes 18 swords, which attack up to 3 opponents with the lowest Health. Each sword deals 40% (ATK) Physical DMG. Passive: Cumulon's Basic Attacks are replaced with a special Basic Attack. Cumulon's Attack SPD cannot be increased or decreased. When receiving Attack SPD altering effects, 65% of the percentage change will be converted into a percentage change in ATK.
Rank 1: The Physical DMG dealt by each of the Active Skill's swords increases to 48%.
Rank 2: Cumulon's Energy Costs decrease by 20.
Rank 4: The Physical DMG dealt by each of the Active Skill's swords increases to 54%.
Rank 6: Cumulon's Basic Attacks and Active Skill ignore 30% Armor and Terminate opponents with 5% or less Health.

Name: Apollinis
Ability Description: Active: Apollinis gains 20% DMG reduction for 5s and simultaneously heals itself for 20% (HP).
Rank 1: The Active Skill's self-healing increases to 24% of Apollinis's Max Health.
Rank 2: Its Active Skill additionally heals the allied Anima with the lowest Health percentage for 15% of Apollinis's Max Health.
Rank 4: The Active Skill's self-healing increases to 28% of Apollinis's Max Health.
Rank 6: Apollinis's Healing increases based on missing Health: 1% increased Healing for every 2% of missing Health.

Name: Felinoxie
Ability Description: Active: Deploys a Brightmoon Shroud with a 1-hex radius that lasts 3s and follows Felinoxie, dealing 180% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents over 3s. Also grants 500% (ATK) Shield for 3s.
Rank 1: Shield Strength is increased to 590% of ATK.
Rank 2: Felinoxie restores 3% Health every second for 3s after using its Active Skill.
Rank 4: Shield Strength is increased to 680% of ATK.
Rank 6: Felinoxie gains 30% DMG reduction while Brightmoon Shroud is active. Gain Passive Skill: At the start of battle, all allied units within Umbral Shroud gain 6% DMG reduction until the end of battle.

Name: Lumeridon
Ability Description: Active: Unleashes a tidal wave toward the straight-line direction with the most opponents, dealing 360% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents hit.
Rank 1: The Physical DMG dealt by the tidal wave increases to 430%.
Rank 2: The wave increases the DMG received by opponents it hits by 20% for 5s.
Rank 4: The Physical DMG dealt by the tidal wave increases to 500%.
Rank 6: The wave Launches the first opponent hit for 0.5s.

Name: Inkicorn
Ability Description: Active: Briefly charges up, then throws opponents with its horn, dealing 200% (MP) Magic DMG and Stunning them for 1.5s. Follows by trampling the ground with its front hooves, dealing 50% (MP) Magic DMG to opponents within 1 hex.
Rank 1: The Magic DMG dealt by the Active Skill's toss increases to 240%.
Rank 2: Additionally gains 420% Shield for 5s after trampling the ground.
Rank 4: The magic DMG dealt by the Active Skill's toss increases to 260%, and the Shield increases to 500%.
Rank 6: Gain Passive Skill: Inkicorn's Energy Costs are reduced by 20.

Name: Heartcease
Ability Description: Active: Unleash a hail of bullets that lasts for 3s towards a 2-hex area around the current target, dealing 300% (ATK) Physical DMG to each opponent.
Rank 1: Physical DMG dealt by Hail of Bullets increases to 330% of ATK.
Rank 2: Hail of Bullets applies 10% Armor Shred to opponents for 5s.
Rank 4: Physical DMG dealt by Hail of Bullets increases to 360% of ATK.
Rank 6: Gain Passive Skill: Regenerates 10 Energy when participating in defeating an opponent.

Name: Dragamour
Ability Description: Active: Dragamour does not use Basic Attacks or move, charging up for 6s instead. While charging up, Dragamour releases Heartfield around itself twice, and generates 1 Charge every second. After fully charging, release Greater Heartfield once. Dragamour's charging up has two modes, Support and Damage. After fully charging in one mode, will switch to the other. Keywords: Heartfield - Support: Heals allied units within 1 hex for 160% (MP) Health. Heartfield - Damage: Deals 100% (MP) Magic DMG to opponents within 1 hex. Greater Heartfield - Support: Grants all allied units 200% (MP) Shield for 5s. Greater Heartfield - Damage: Deals 140% (MP) Magic DMG to all opponents.
Rank 1: The Healing from Heartfield - Support increases to 180% MP; The Shield Strength of Greater Heartfield - Support increases to 225% MP; The Magic DMG dealt by Heartfield - Damage increases to 125% MP; The Magic DMG dealt by Greater Heartfield - Damage increases to 170% MP.
Rank 2: Greater Heartfield - Support increases the Attack SPD of allied units by 40% for 5s. Greater Heartfield - Damage applies 10% Armor Shred and 10% MR Shred for 5s.
Rank 4: The Healing from Heartfield - Support increases to 200% MP; The Shield Strength of Greater Heartfield - Support increases to 250% MP; The Magic DMG dealt by Heartfield - Damage increases to 150% MP; The Magic DMG dealt by Greater Heartfield - Damage increases to 200% MP.
Rank 6: The Attack SPD buff from Greater Heartfield - Support stacks and lasts until the end of battle. Greater Heartfield - Damage can Stun opponents for 1s.

Name: Corvariatio
Ability Description: Active: Corvariatio draws 2 Nexus Cards, and uses its skill based on colors of cards drawn: Double Blue, Red and Blue, or Double Red. Keywords: Double Blue: Attack SPD increases by 49% for 5s, throws Nexus Card at target dealing 170% (ATK) Physical DMG. Red and Blue: Throws piercing Nexus Card dealing 320% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents hit. Double Red: Briefly becomes Untargetable, throws 3 Nexus Cards at opponents each dealing 230% (ATK) Physical DMG.
Rank 1: Active Skill is enhanced: The Attack SPD buff from Double Blue increases to 60% and DMG increases to 200% ATK. The DMG dealt by Red and Blue increases to 360% ATK. The DMG dealt by Double Red increases to 265%.
Rank 2: After the Active Skill - Double Blue hits, it generates 7 Energy for Corvariatio. Double Red will Stun opponents hit for 1.5s. Gain Passive Skill: After Corvariatio participates in defeating an opponent, the chance of drawing a Red Nexuno Card increases by 7%.
Rank 4: The chance of drawing Red Nexuno Cards from the Passive Skill increases to 14%. Active Skill is enhanced: The Attack SPD buff from Double Blue increases to 71%, DMG increases to 230% ATK, and Energy regenerated after hitting increases to 10. The DMG dealt by Red and Blue increases to 400% ATK. The DMG dealt by Double Red increases to 300%.
Rank 6: After using its Active Skill, Corvariatio regenerates 10 Energy and its chance of drawing a Red Nexuno Card increases by a stacking 14%.

Name: Vulberry
Ability Description: Active: Lobs a cream ice cream cake, dealing 650% (MP) Magic DMG to the target and dealing 240% (MP) Magic DMG to other opponents within 1 hex of them.
Rank 1: Magic DMG dealt by the cream ice cream cake to the target opponent increases to 725%, and Magic DMG dealt to other opponents within 1 hex of the target increases to 270%.
Rank 2: The target of the cream ice cream cake is Stunned for 2s when they are hit.
Rank 4: Magic DMG dealt by the cream ice cream cake to the target opponent increases to 800%, and Magic DMG dealt to other opponents within 1 hex of the target increases to 300%.
Rank 6: Vulberry lobs a cream ice cream cake at the enemy unit with the most opponents nearby, and converts 25% of the DMG dealt to True DMG. Gain Passive Skill: Each time an allied Anima is healed by the Satiation Synergy, MP increases by 3% until the end of battle. Max 15 stacks.

Name: Noctumbra
Ability Description: Active: Charge to the opponent farthest away, dealing 200% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents along the path, and applying or removing Lingering Shade. Keyword: Lingering Shade: When the Active Skill hits opponents without Lingering Shade, mark them with Lingering Shade for 6s. When hits opponents with Lingering Shade, deals 310% (ATK) Physical DMG and removes it.
Rank 1: DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 230% Physical DMG. DMG dealt by Lingering Shade increases to 365% Physical DMG.
Rank 2: Lingering Shade will not be removed, and the DMG received by opponents with Lingering Shade increases by 12%.
Rank 4: DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 260% Physical DMG. DMG dealt by Lingering Shade increases to 420% Physical DMG.
Rank 6: 50% of the DMG dealt by the Active Skill to opponents with Lingering Shade is converted to True DMG. In addition, when Noctumbra defeats an opponent, it regenerates 10 Energy.

Name: Mushgloomini
Ability Description: Resolve: Release spores, dealing 300% (ATK) Physical DMG to adjacent opponents, and also healing itself for 15% (HP) Health. Keyword: Resolve: Skill is used once when Health first reaches or drops below 50%.
Rank 1: Health increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Skill additionally applies 15% Deep Wounds to targets hit for 4s.
Rank 4: The Physical DMG dealt by spores increases to 390%.
Rank 6: Skill Healing increases to 20%.

Name: Faeflux
Ability Description: Active: Hurls an hourglass at the densest group of opponents, Imprisoning the target and opponents within 1 hex for 2.5s. The hourglass explodes after 2.5s, dealing 410% (MP) Magic DMG to opponents within 1 hex of it.
Rank 1: The Magic DMG dealt by the hourglass's explosion increases to 470% MP.
Rank 2: Faeflux deals Magic DMG equal to 50% MP every 0.5s to opponents who are Imprisoned by its hourglass.
Rank 4: The Magic DMG dealt by the hourglass's explosion increases to 530% MP.
Rank 6: The hourglass Stuns instead of Imprisoning.

Name: Lepinamel
Ability Description: First Strike: Hurl an Orb at a target opponent that deals 300% (MP) Magic DMG to the target and opponents within 1 hex. Keyword: First Strike: Is used at the start of battle.
Rank 1: MP increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Hurl an additional Orb, dealing 150% MP Magic DMG to opponents within 1 hex.
Rank 4: The first Orb's DMG increases to 360% MP, and the additional Orb's DMG increases to 200% MP.
Rank 6: Lepinamel now throws the Orbs at the opponent with the most enemy units nearby.

Name: Donubi
Ability Description: Active: Throws toxic donuts at the nearest opponent not Poisoned, Poisoning them for 3s. The Poison deals 100% (ATK) Physical DMG every second.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Poisoned opponents additionally receive 15% Deep Wounds.
Rank 4: Physical DMG dealt by Poison increases to 130%/s.
Rank 6: Poison duration increases to 6s.

Name: Olivesper
Ability Description: Active: Launches magical missiles at the 2 closest opponents, dealing 175% (MP) Magic DMG and granting 200% (MP) Shield to the allied unit with the lowest Health percentage for 4s.
Rank 1: MP increases by 12%.
Rank 2: The Active Skill will grant its Shield to 1 additional allied unit with the lowest Health percentage. Shield Strength decreased to 150%.
Rank 4: Shield Strength increases to 220%.
Rank 6: Allied units Shielded by Olivesper's Active Skill gain 25 Armor and MR until the battle ends.

Name: Squarel
Ability Description: Aid: Launches a large pinecone at an opponent, dealing 355% (ATK) Physical DMG, and launches a small pinecone at the strongest allied unit, increasing their Attack SPD by 50% for 4s. Keyword: Aid: Used when the strongest allied Anima uses their Skill.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: A small pinecone additionally grants the target a 20% ATK bonus.
Rank 4: Physical DMG dealt by the large pinecone increases to 415% of ATK.
Rank 6: The Attack SPD bonus provided by the small pinecone increases to 80%, and the ATK bonus increases to 40%.

Name: Furrari
Ability Description: Active: Charges at the opponent furthest away within a 3-hex radius, dealing 120% (ATK) Physical DMG to the target and all opponents along the path. Gains 22% (HP) Shield for 5s after hitting the opponent furthest away.
Rank 1: Shield Strength increases to 25% of Max Health.
Rank 2: After Charge hits the target opponent, it will Stun them for 2s.
Rank 4: Shield Strength increases to 26% of Max Health.
Rank 6: Other opponents hit by the charge other than the targeted opponent will also be Stunned for 2s. Gain Passive Skill: For every 100 Competition Points the team earns, Furrari gains a Shield equal to 10% of its Max Health.

Name: Magisdrake
Ability Description: Active: Smashes the ground, dealing 200% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents within 1 hex.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Motivates itself after using its skill, gaining an additional 1.5s of healing over time, restoring 250% Health.
Rank 4: Active Skill Healing increases to 330% ATK.
Rank 6: Active Skill DMG increases to 260% ATK.

Name: Nomnom
Ability Description: Active: Heals itself for 360% (MP) over 3s, and then deals 250% (MP) Magic DMG to the current target opponent.
Rank 1: The Active Skill's Healing increases to 420%.
Rank 2: Gains 30% DMG reduction for the duration of the Active Skill's Healing.
Rank 4: Magic DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 325%.
Rank 6: In addition to the current target, the Active Skill will also deal 160% Magic DMG to other opponents within 1 hex of the target.

Name: Pupanoo
Ability Description: Active: Throw a fried egg at the current target opponent, dealing 180% (MP) Magic DMG.
Rank 1: MP increases by 12%.
Rank 2: The Active Skill throws fried eggs at the 3 nearest opponents, and the Magic DMG dealt by the fried eggs is reduced to 130%.
Rank 4: The Magic DMG dealt by the fried eggs increases to 240%.
Rank 6: Fried eggs apply 10% MR Shred for 5s.

Name: Bobabirb
Ability Description: Active: Fires 5 boba at the nearest opponent, each dealing 90% (ATK) Physical DMG.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: The Active Skill fires the last round of boba at the 3 nearest opponents at the same time.
Rank 4: The Physical DMG dealt by the first 4 boba increases to 120%.
Rank 6: The Physical DMG dealt by the last 3 boba increases to 160%.

Name: Eggnok
Ability Description: Active: Attacks an opponent with a vicious uppercut, Stunning them for 0.7s, dealing 200% (ATK) Physical DMG, and knocking them towards where opponents are densest. A shock is triggered when the target lands, dealing 100% (ATK) Physical DMG to them and opponents within 1 hex.
Rank 1: The Physical DMG dealt by the uppercut increases to 280%.
Rank 2: The Active Skill grants Eggnok 450% Shield for 4s.
Rank 4: Shield Strength increases to 540%.
Rank 6: The shock triggered by the Active Skill's target landing Stuns opponents for 1s.

Name: Rosfurcate
Ability Description: Active: Moves next to a random opponent within 2 hexes and attacks them, dealing 350% (ATK) Physical DMG.
Rank 1: Physical DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 415%.
Rank 2: Within 3s after Rosfurcate uses its Skill, deals 40% bonus DMG to the target.
Rank 4: Physical DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 480%.
Rank 6: DMG increase dealt by the Active Skill increases to 65%, and the distance traveled increases to 4 hexes.

Name: Glampa
Ability Description: Active: Glampa quickly moves behind the nearest opponent, flinging them backward to deal 650% (MP) Magic DMG, and deals 230% (MP) Magic DMG to other opponents within 1 hex of the landing spot. Passive: Glampa begins battle in the Sleep state, and Awakens and uses its Active Skill after the requirements are met. Keywords: Sleep state: DMG dealt increases by 2% every second. Increases by additional 2% when allied unit defeated. Persists until battle ends. Awakening: After Sleeping for 8s, when Health drops below 50%, or team's total Health drops below 50%, Glampa awakens. Removes all debuffs and gains 45 Armor and MR.
Rank 1: The Armor and MR gained when Sleep ends increases to 55. The DMG dealt to the Active Skill's target increases to 770%, and DMG dealt to opponents near the landing spot increases to 275%.
Rank 2: While Sleeping, gain 3% Omnileech every second, and gain 3% Omnileech when an allied unit is defeated. The Active Skill Stuns the target for 2s.
Rank 4: The Armor and MR gained when Sleep ends increases to 65. The DMG dealt to the Active Skill's target increases to 890%, and DMG dealt to opponents near the landing spot increases to 320%.
Rank 6: The Active Skill also Stuns opponents within 1 hex of the target's landing spot for 1s.

Name: Chowpownd
Ability Description: Active: Turns the nearest opponent into a dessert and swallows them whole, dealing 300% (MP) +10% (HP) Magic DMG as they are digested and granting itself 200% (MP) +10% (HP) Shield. After a short time, opponent is spat back out.
Rank 1: The Magic DMG dealt by the Active Skill to the opponent increases to 350% +12%, and Shield Strength increases to 230% +12%.
Rank 2: Gain Passive Skill: Each time Chowpownd ingests an opponent, its Max Health and MP increase by 5% and it grows in size. If this Skill defeats the opponent, this buff is increased by 3x. This effect can stack.
Rank 4: The Magic DMG dealt by the Active Skill to the opponent increases to 400% +14%, and Shield Strength increases to 260% +14%.
Rank 6: Chowpownd will Terminate swallowed opponents with less than 10% Health.

Name: Damasque
Ability Description: Active: Inspire the strongest allied unit, granting them buffs based on role: Frontline Tank: Gain 320% (MP) Shield for 8s; Physical Carry: Gain 30% (MP) ATK for 6s; Magic Carry: Gain 40% (MP) MP for 8s. Passive: Damasque's Basic Attacks deal 80% bonus Magic DMG when they hit.
Rank 1: Increases the Active Skill's Shield to 350% of Damasque's MP, the ATK Bonus to 35% of Damasque's MP, and the MP Bonus to 47% of Damasque's MP.
Rank 2: The Active Skill's target is changed to the 2 strongest allied units.
Rank 4: Increases the Active Skill's Shield to 380% of Damasque's MP, the ATK Bonus to 40% of Damasque's MP, and the MP Bonus to 54% of Damasque's MP. Bonus Magic DMG on Basic Attacks increases to 100%.
Rank 6: The Active Skill grants target allied Anima all 3 different buffs.

Name: Cublade
Ability Description: Active: Chops the target, dealing 250% (ATK) Physical DMG.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Gain Passive Skill: Regenerate all Energy when receiving a Control Effect.
Rank 4: DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 300%.
Rank 6: Active Skill's CRIT Rate and CRIT DMG increase by 20% and 30% respectively.

Name: Marshalbird
Ability Description: Active: Performs 4 consecutive attacks on the target, each dealing 90% (ATK) Physical DMG, followed by a heavy attack that deals 270% (ATK) Physical DMG.
Rank 1: Increases the DMG dealt by the Active Skill's consecutive attacks to 105% of ATK and heavy attack to 310% of ATK.
Rank 2: Gains Passive Skill: Marshalbird's DMG dealt increases by 20% for 6s after switching targets.
Rank 4: Increases the DMG dealt by the Active Skill's consecutive attacks to 120% of ATK and heavy attack to 350% of ATK.
Rank 6: The DMG dealt by the Active Skill's heavy attack is increased by 20% of the target's missing Health, and it will restore Health to Marshalbird equal to 30% of this instance of DMG. After each instance of Skill DMG dealt, applies 15% Armor Shred to the target for 8s.

Name: Plumelune
Ability Description: Active: Plumelune summons a Zephyr that blows towards the row with the most allied units, dealing 180% (MP) Magic DMG to opponents and granting allied units 160% (MP) Shield for 8s.
Rank 1: The Shield granted by Zephyr increases to 185%.
Rank 2: Units protected by Zephyr's Shield gain 50% Attack SPD.
Rank 4: The Shield granted by Zephyr increases to 210%.
Rank 6: The Shield Zephyr grants can last until the end of battle.

Name: Mimoo
Ability Description: Active: Mimoo performs a spinning attack, dealing 65% (MP) Magic DMG to opponents within 1 hex while spinning. Spins for 3s with a base number of 9 spins, plus 3.5 spins over the duration for every 1 point of increased Attack SPD.
Rank 1: Spin DMG dealt increases to 77%.
Rank 2: Mimoo takes 30% reduced DMG while spinning.
Rank 4: Spin DMG dealt increases to 90%.
Rank 6: Gain Passive Skill: Whenever Mimoo participates in defeating an enemy Anima while spinning, it gains a stacking 40% Attack SPD increase that lasts until the end of battle, and also gains a stacking 5 reduction in the Energy Costs of its next Active Skill. Mimoo deals 25% increased DMG to Stunned or Frozen opponents.

Name: Rimechime
Ability Description: Active: Fire a snowball at the nearest opponent, dealing 360% (MP) Magic DMG. The snowball then explodes, dealing 180% (MP) Magic DMG to other enemy units within 1 hex of the target.
Rank 1: MP increases by 12%.
Rank 2: The snowball will deal 3s of 30% Chill to the Skill's target and other units affected by the explosion.
Rank 4: The DMG dealt by the snowball increases to 420%, and DMG dealt by the explosion increases to 215%.
Rank 6: Extends the duration of Chill applied by the Active Skill to 5s.

Name: Vixemourne
Ability Description: Active: Hurl a Shadow Orb at the target that deals 250% (ATK) Physical DMG. The Orb will then Blur once. Keyword: Blur: If there are other enemy units within 3 hexes of the target hit by the Orb, the Orb will ricochet to the unit with the lowest Health percentage within that area, dealing 280% (ATK) Physical DMG. If there are no other targets, the Orb will deal that same additional DMG to the last target it hit.
Rank 1: The Shadow Orb's Blur DMG increases to 320%.
Rank 2: The Shadow Orb's number of "Blur" ricochets increases to 2.
Rank 4: The Shadow Orb's Blur DMG increases to 360%.
Rank 6: Blur can Terminate targets below 10% Health.

Name: Bladehound
Ability Description: Active: Release Bonespikes in all directions, dealing 300% (ATK) ATK as Physical DMG to all opponents within 2 hexes. If any opponents are 1 hex away, they are also Stunned for 1s. Passive: ATK is increased by 2% of Max Health.
Rank 1: Increases DMG dealt by the Active Skill to 360% ATK.
Rank 2: The Active Skill deals an additional 15% Max Health as Physical DMG to opponents within 1 hex, and Stun duration increases to 2s.
Rank 4: Increases DMG dealt by the Active Skill to 420% ATK.
Rank 6: Bladehound gains Max Health equal to 2% of an opponent's Max Health whenever it participates in defeating that opponent.

Name: Eggluvs
Ability Description: Active: Throw a hook punch combo at opponents, dealing 300% (ATK) Physical DMG twice. Passive: Eggluvs maintains Guard state instead of using Basic Attacks: Gain 10% DMG reduction. Regenerate 12 Energy every 2s.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Regenerate an additional 3 Energy when hit in Guard state.
Rank 4: Physical DMG dealt by each punch of the Active Skill increases to 390%.
Rank 6: The Active Skill Stuns opponents for 2s.

Name: Chimaura
Ability Description: Active: Slash with both claws, dealing 390% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents in a 1-hex fan-shaped AoE in front of it. Passive: When attacking a target more than 1 but no more than 3 hexes away, Chimaura will pounce toward the target.
Rank 1: DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 450%.
Rank 2: The Active Skill will additionally grant Chimaura 30% Attack SPD and 20% Omnileech bonus for 5s.
Rank 4: DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 510%.
Rank 6: After Chimaura uses its Skill, it gains a stacking Attack SPD bonus that lasts until the end of battle.

Name: Donnatallow
Ability Description: Active: Hurl phosphor flames at the current target. After hitting, applies Smolder for 10s, dealing 41% Physical DMG every second. Smolder can stack up to 3 times, and the duration resets when a new stack is applied.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: The Smolder status also applies Deep Wounds.
Rank 4: Smolder's DoT increases to 52% ATK per second.
Rank 6: Smolder additionally reduces the target's Armor by 4.

Name: Frigull
Ability Description: First Strike: Frigull spins, firing sauce and fries at opponents within 1 hex, dealing 350% (MP) Magic DMG and applying 10% Energy Jam to targets after hitting. Keywords: First Strike: Is used at the start of battle. Energy Jam: Energy Cost of the next Skill usage increases by 10%.
Rank 1: MP increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Opponents will take an extra 150% Physical DMG the next time they use their Skill after Frigull's Energy Jam is applied to them.
Rank 4: DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 440% Physical DMG.
Rank 6: The Skill's Energy Jam effect increases to 15%.

Name: Starspine
Ability Description: Active: Targeting the 3 nearest opponents, guide 3 Starlight to attack their locations. Each Starlight attacks with 2 Starfalls, each dealing 150% (MP) Magic DMG.
Rank 1: The DMG dealt by Starfall attacks increases to 170% MP.
Rank 2: Starfall attacks reduce the target's Armor and MR by 2. This effect can stack and lasts until the end of battle.
Rank 4: The DMG dealt by Starfall attacks increases to 190% MP.
Rank 6: The first Starfall Stuns the target for 1s when it hits.

Name: Camcorgi
Ability Description: Active: Camcorgi takes a picture of a fan-shaped area in front, applying freeze-frame to opponents hit for 2.5s and firing 50% (ASPD) +12 photos at them (fire 1 extra photo for every 50% of Attack SPD increased), each dealing 75% Physical DMG. When the picture does not hit any opponents, fires 6 photos at nearest opponent instead. Passive: Regenerates 3 Energy when any opponent on the field becomes Controlled.
Rank 1: Physical DMG dealt by Photos increases to 90%.
Rank 2: Attacks that hit opponents in freeze-frame always Critically Hit.
Rank 4: Physical DMG dealt by Photos increases to 105%.
Rank 6: Camcorgi applies Undying to itself and allied units hit by the picture for 2.5s.

Name: Kaffiend
Ability Description: Resolve: Launches an espresso towards the allied Anima possessing the highest total ATK and MP, granting them 120% increased Attack SPD that decays over 4s. Keyword: Resolve: Skill is used once when Health first reaches or drops below 50%.
Rank 1: MP increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Kaffiend will also gain a Shield from its Active Skill: Shield Strength is 600% and decays over 4s.
Rank 4: The initial Attack SPD increase from the Active Skill increases to 150%, and the initial Shield Strength increases to 700%.
Rank 6: The Active Skill will apply its Shield to both Kaffiend itself and the target at the same time.

Name: Foalhardy
Ability Description: Active: Foalhardy instantly recovers 30% of its missing Health and Foally Counterattacks the target. For the next 5s, Foalhardy has a 20% chance to trigger Counterattack again after being hit by an attack. Keyword: Foally Counterattack: Attack the target twice in a row, each hit dealing 100% (ATK) Physical DMG and healing itself for 10 Health.
Rank 1: The chance to Counterattack opponents increases to 35%.
Rank 2: Gains 20% DMG reduction during the Skill's duration.
Rank 4: The DMG reduction increases to 30%.
Rank 6: The chance to Counterattack opponents increases to 50%.

Name: Octopourri
Ability Description: Active: Grants 300% (MP) Shield to the allied unit with the highest Attack SPD for 6s. When Basic Attacks from the unit protected by this Shield hit, deal 55% (MP) bonus Magic DMG.
Rank 1: The Active Skill's Shield Strength increases to 345% MP and the bonus DMG increases to 65% of Octopourri's MP.
Rank 2: The Active Skill now targets Octopourri and the allied unit with the highest Attack SPD.
Rank 4: The Active Skill's Shield Strength increases to 390% MP and the bonus DMG increases to 75% of Octopourri's MP.
Rank 6: Increases the Attack SPD of units under the Shield's protection by 40%.

Name: Hoppelon
Ability Description: Active: Enter Counterattack Mode and gain 500% (ATK) Shield. When the Shield is broken for the first time or Counterattack Mode ends, its formation scatters, splitting into three independent apple hoplites that battle. Reforms when any two apple hoplites are defeated. Keywords: Counterattack Mode: Form up into a defensive stack for 4s. While in this state, take 25% less DMG and counterattack when attacked, dealing 150% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents within 1 hex. Counterattack can be triggered once per second. Scattered Formation: Removes all Control Effects and splits into 3 independent apple hoplites, which inherit a proportion of Hoppelon's Max Health, Armor, MR, ATK, and MP. Shieldbearer: For the next 6s, causes all apple hoplites to focus on its current target and increases their Attack SPD by 100%. Spearman: Deals Physical DMG equal to 100% of ATK to the target 4 times. Javelineer: ATK increases by 30% for 5s. Reforming: The apple hoplites reform into a Hoppelon that has 30% reduced Max Health from when its formation scattered.
Rank 1: Shield Strength increases to 600%.
Rank 2: Gain Passive Skill: Apple hoplites gain a Shield equal to 20% when they participate in defeating an opponent.
Rank 4: The ratio of Max Health, ATK, and MP inherited by each apple hoplite from Hoppelon increases by 20%.
Rank 6: Hoppelon will scatter formation once again before being defeated.

Name: Mr. Avocado
Ability Description: Resolve: Mr. Avocado gains 50% DMG reduction for 3s. Mr. Avocado continuously grows taller before falling forward and dealing 20% (HP) Physical DMG to opponents in a 2-hex line in front of it. Keyword: Resolve: Is used the first time Health drops below 50%.
Rank 1: Health increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Mr. Avocado gains 10% Max Health until the end of battle after using its Active Skill.
Rank 4: Max Health bonus increases to 15%, and Skill DMG increases to 30% of Mr. Avocado's Max Health.
Rank 6: The Active Skill's DMG reduction increases to 75%.

Name: Cinechel
Ability Description: Active: Cinechel enters Rewind, healing itself over time throughout the duration. After Rewind ends, applies 10% of Armor Shred to opponents within a 2-hex radius for 4s, and the next 3 Basic Attacks become Exposure Developments. Keywords: Rewind: Cinechel heals itself over time for 40% of the total DMG received in the 2s before the Active Skill was used plus 10% of its initial Max Health. Exposure Development: Attack a 2-hex radius fan-shaped area in front with flashes, dealing 5 instances of 1.5% (HP) Physical DMG.
Rank 1: DMG dealt by the Exposure Development increases to 1.8%.
Rank 2: After Rewind ends, the number of Basic Attacks converted to Exposure Developments increases to 4.
Rank 4: DMG dealt by the Exposure Development increases to 2.1%.
Rank 6: The Rewind healing over time effect becomes an increase in Max Health.

Name: C'locked
Ability Description: Active: Throws a time capsule that lasts for 5s at the allied Anima with the highest ATK, increasing its Attack SPD by 35% for the duration.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Additionally allows the time capsule to grant a Shield equal to 200% ATK to the target.
Rank 4: The Attack SPD bonus provided by the time capsule increases to 55%.
Rank 6: The Shield Strength provided by the time capsule increases to 350% ATK.

Name: Catnapir
Ability Description: Active: Catnapir casts a mental spell to all enemy Anima within 2 hexes. If Catnapir is within their attack range, changes their attack target to Catnapir and grants itself 95% (DEF + MDEF) Shield for 6s.
Rank 1: Shield Strength increases to 65% of total Armor and MR.
Rank 2: Gain Passive Skill: Every 2s, regenerate 1 Energy for each opponent attacking it.
Rank 4: Shield Strength increases to 75% of total Armor and MR combined.
Rank 6: After using the Skill, additionally increase Shield Strength based on the number of opponents attacking it.

Name: Framamba
Ability Description: Active: Fires an energy bolt that deals 300% (ATK) Physical DMG at the nearest enemy unit. In addition, it also enhances itself, entering the Focused state for 6s. The Focused state effect can stack up to 5 times. Keyword: Focused: DMG dealt by Basic Attacks increases by 30%.
Rank 1: The Active Skill's enhancement increases Basic Attack DMG to 40%.
Rank 2: The Active Skill's enhancement also increases Attack SPD by 45%.
Rank 4: The Active Skill's enhancement increases Basic Attack DMG to 50%.
Rank 6: Extends the duration of Focused state to 8s.

Name: Chocllamour
Ability Description: Resolve: Charges toward the target, dealing 275% (MP) Magic DMG and granting itself 350% Shield for 6s. Keyword: Resolve: This Skill can be used when the Anima's Health drops below 50%.
Rank 1: MP increases by 12%.
Rank 2: The charge Stuns the target for 0.5s.
Rank 4: Skill DMG increases to 330%.
Rank 6: Stun duration increases to 1.0s.

Name: Capybunner
Ability Description: First Strike: Grants itself 300% (MP) Shield for 6s and deals 220% (MP) Magic DMG to opponents in front of it within a straight-line distance of 2 hexes. Keyword: First Strike: Use this Skill once at the start of battle.
Rank 1: Health increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Gain Passive Skill: Grants itself 20% DMG reduction while the Active Skill's Shield exists.
Rank 4: The Active Skill's Shield Strength increases to 350% MP, and Skill DMG increases to 280% MP.
Rank 6: The Passive Skill's DMG reduction increases to 30%.

Name: Waxula
Ability Description: Active: Black Cloak: Summon Count Wax in the area of the battlefield where opponents are densest, dealing 100% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents within 1 hex, and turn into White Wax. White Wax heals Count Wax for 30+240% (ATK) Health. Count Wax blinks to the location where enemy units are densest, and continuously releases swarms of bats for 3s, dealing 60% Physical DMG every 0.25s to opponents within 1 hex. Keywords: Black Cloak: Has two states, Black Cloak and White Wax. Enters battle as Black Cloak. Count Wax: Count Wax is Untargetable, and its Health will decay over time. Once defeated, it returns to White Wax. White Wax: Has two states, Black Cloak and White Wax. After Black Cloak uses its Active Skill, it summons Count Wax and turns into White Wax. After Count Wax has been defeated, White Wax turns back into Black Cloak.
Rank 1: Physical DMG dealt when Black Cloak summons Count Wax increases to 125%. Physical DMG dealt when Count Wax releases swarms of bats increases to 70% every 0.25s.
Rank 2: Count Wax's Basic Attacks will heal it for 50% after dealing DMG.
Rank 4: Physical DMG dealt when Black Cloak summons Count Wax increases to 150%. Physical DMG dealt when Count Wax releases swarms of bats increases to 80% every 0.25s.
Rank 6: After Count Wax uses its Active Skill, it also gains 30% Omnileech.

Name: Pomparrot
Ability Description: Active: Pomparrot enters Party state. While active, Basic Attacks fire fireworks, dealing 80% (ATK) Physical DMG to the target and opponents within 1 hex of them. When Party state ends, fire a massive firework, dealing 230% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents on the entire battlefield. Keyword: Party state: Attack range increases by 4 hexes, gains 50% Attack SPD, and Basic Attacks are transformed. Lasts 5s.
Rank 1: The Attack SPD gain in Party state increases to 70%.
Rank 2: The massive firework applies 15% Deep Wounds for 5s.
Rank 4: The Attack SPD gain in Party state increases to 90%.
Rank 6: Gain Passive Skill: After Pomparrot defeats an opponent, it gains 100% Attack SPD which decays over 5s.

Name: Hamburgoof
Ability Description: Active: Unleash 3 barrages, each barrage firing a total of 5 burgers at the target and other opponents within 2 hexes of the target randomly, and each burger including the effects of all the toppings. Reloads before each barrage, and increasing Attack SPD reduces reload time and increases barrage speed. Passive: Hamburgoof's Basic Attacks fire toppings, and each topping type has a different effect. After each time the Active Skill is used, cycle to the next topping in the topping list in order. Keywords: Topping list: Tomatoes: Reduce the target's Armor by 2 after hitting. This effect stacks and lasts until the end of battle. Patty: DMG increases to 110% (ATK).
Rank 1: The effect of each topping is enhanced: Tomatoes: Armor reduction increases to 3; Patty: DMG increases to 115% ATK.
Rank 2: Add the Cheese topping: Hamburgoof gains 1% Attack SPD after hitting. This effect stacks and lasts until the end of battle.
Rank 4: The effect of each topping is enhanced: Tomatoes: Armor reduction increases to 4; Patty: DMG increases to 120% ATK; Cheese: Each stack of Attack SPD increases to 2%.
Rank 6: Barrages of the Active Skill increases to 5.

Name: Magisaki
Ability Description: Resolve: Magisaki summons a magic hat to attack opponents, dealing 350% (MP) Magic DMG. Grants itself 20% (HP) Shield for 4s. Keyword: Resolve: Skill is used the first time Health drops below 50%.
Rank 1: Health increases by 12%.
Rank 2: The Active Skill gains an additional effect: After hitting an opponent, their DMG dealt is reduced by 20% for 6s.
Rank 4: Skill DMG increases to 450% MP.
Rank 6: The Active Skill's Shield increases to 30%.

Name: Beaubeanie
Ability Description: Active: Beaubeanie waves its tentacles, firing two magic orbs at the 2 nearest opponents. After hitting, each orb deals 230% (MP) Magic DMG, and simultaneously deals 100% (MP) Magic DMG to all opponents within 1 hex of the target.
Rank 1: The DMG dealt by each orb increases to 275%, and AoE DMG dealt increases to 125%.
Rank 2: Gain Passive Skill: The Energy Cost of Beaubeanie's Active Skill decreases by 10.
Rank 4: The DMG dealt by each orb increases to 320%, and AoE DMG dealt increases to 150%.
Rank 6: Additionally applies 10% MR Shred for 5s when the Orb hits a target.

Name: Lumehart
Ability Description: Active: Lumehart summons 6 Jadeblossoms to attack opponents. Each Jadeblossom deals 100% (MP) Magic DMG and applies Kindlelight. Jadeblossoms prioritize attacking opponents without Kindlelight. Each time the Active Skill has been used twice, the next Active Skill becomes: Summon a Hartheart that leaps towards the opponent farthest away, dealing 250% (MP) Magic DMG to the target and every opponent in the AoE of its path. Keyword: Kindlelight: When hit by Hartheart, the DMG dealt by this instance of Hartheart increases to 250%+140% (MP), and Kindlelight is removed.
Rank 1: The Magic DMG dealt by Jadeblossoms increases to 115% MP. The Magic DMG dealt by Hartheart increases to 290% MP.
Rank 2: After Jadeblossoms hit opponents, they also reduce the target's MR by 4. This effect stacks and lasts until the end of battle.
Rank 4: The Magic DMG dealt by Jadeblossoms increases to 130% MP. The Magic DMG dealt by Hartheart increases to 330% MP.
Rank 6: Gain Passive Skill: Each time Hartheart is summoned, Lumehart's MP increases by 20. This effect stacks and lasts until the end of battle.

Name: Hugglebeary
Ability Description: Active: After jumping up, Hugglebeary smashes into the ground, dealing 120% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents within 1 hex; it then jumps up and crashes down again, dealing 180% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents within 1 hex, and gains 22% (HP) Shield for 6s.
Rank 1: The Active Skill's Shield Strength increases to 26%.
Rank 2: Gain Passive Skill: After Hugglebeary is attacked by a Basic Attack, the next time it uses its Active Skill, Shield Strength increases by 2%. This effect stacks.
Rank 4: The Active Skill's Shield Strength increases to 31%.
Rank 6: Gain Passive Skill: When Hugglebeary has a Shield, it gains 35 Armor and MR.

Name: Derpydile
Ability Description: Active: Derpydile unleashes 3 soundwaves, each dealing 100% (ATK) Physical DMG to opponents within 1 hex. Gains 1% (HP) Shield for each opponent hit.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: The last soundwave deals 100% ATK as bonus Physical DMG.
Rank 4: The base DMG of each soundwave increases to 200% of Derpydile's ATK.
Rank 6: The Shield gained increases to 2% of Derpydile's Max Health.

Name: Umpurrella
Ability Description: Active: Umpurrella releases a Meow Cloud over the head of the target, and for the next 6s, continually strikes 2 random opponents within 2 hexes with 5 Thunderbolts and 3 Megabolts. Umpurrella is immune to Control Effects for the duration. Thunderbolts and Megabolts each deal 100% and 180% Magic DMG respectively. When the Meow Cloud disappears, it will heal the 3 nearest allied units for 10% of the total DMG done by the Meow Cloud.
Rank 1: Magic DMG dealt by Thunderbolts and Megabolts increases to 113% and 200% of Umpurrella's MP respectively.
Rank 2: Number of Meow Cloud targets increases to 4.
Rank 4: Magic DMG dealt by Thunderbolts and Megabolts increases to 125% and 220% of Umpurrella's MP respectively.
Rank 6: Megabolts Stun targets hit for 1s.

Name: Sharkalaka
Ability Description: Active: Leap and strike the current target, dealing 320% (MP) Magic DMG to the target and opponents within 1 hex.
Rank 1: Skill DMG increases to 370%.
Rank 2: After the Skill hits, it additionally applies 10% MR Shred for 7s.
Rank 4: Skill DMG increases to 420%.
Rank 6: Deal bonus Magic DMG to the targeted opponent in the center equal to 12% of their Max Health.

Name: Ugglewing
Ability Description: Active: Fires a piercing leaf dart at the current target, dealing 150% (ATK) Physical DMG. Each opponent hit by the leaf dart reduces the DMG dealt by 20%, down to a minimum of 40% of the original DMG.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Leaf Darts now also apply 33% Deep Wounds for 5s to targets hit.
Rank 4: Leaf Dart's base DMG increases to 200%.
Rank 6: The leaf dart deals 100% bonus Physical DMG when it hits the first target.

Name: Goldfogey
Ability Description: Active: Enhance the next 3 Basic Attacks of Goldfogey, increasing 50% Attack SPD and 100% (ATK) DMG dealt. While enhancing Basic Attacks, there is a chance to enter Forgetfulness. Keyword: Forgetfulness state: Forgets to use Basic Attacks, restoring 250% (ATK) Health instead.
Rank 1: ATK increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Healing in Forgetfulness increases to 350% Physical ATK.
Rank 4: After enhancing Basic Attacks, increase Attack SPD to 75% and DMG dealt to 125% Physical ATK.
Rank 6: The number of enhanced Basic Attacks increases to 4.

Name: Mariminnow
Ability Description: Active: Rush toward the current target, dealing 200% (MP) Magic DMG.
Rank 1: Health increases by 12%
Rank 2: Using its skill heals itself for 300% of MP
Rank 4: Skill DMG increased to 240% MP, and Skill healing increased to 360% MP
Rank 6: Skill healing increases to 400% MP

Name: Muscimmon
Ability Description: Active: On usage, briefly charges up, swelling its arms and restoring 15% (HP) Health. After, it jumps up and slams down, dealing 300% (ATK) Physical DMG to all opponents within 1 hex.
Rank 1: Health restored increases to 20%, Skill DMG increases to 360%.
Rank 2: Additionally knocks targets hit by the skill are airborne for 0.5s.
Rank 4: Health restored increases to 25%, Skill DMG increases to 420%.
Rank 6: Attack SPD for the next 4 Basic Attacks increases by 50% after using this Skill.

Name: Sunspottie
Ability Description: Active: Showers sunlight on the nearest opponent, dealing 220% (MP) Magic DMG to all opponents within 2 hexes of the target. Passive: Does not move or use Basic Attacks. Absorbs sunlight at fixed interval, unaffected by Attack SPD. Each time regenerates 11 Energy and heals for 100% (MP) Health. Keywords: Absorb Sunlight: Increases effect of next Active Ability by 25% each time absorbed, max 4 stacks. When receiving Attack SPD changes, 60% converted to MP change.
Rank 1: The Magic DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 260%.
Rank 2: Additionally heals the allied unit with the lowest Health percentage when absorbing sunlight.
Rank 4: The Magic DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 300%.
Rank 6: The Active Skill heals allied units within the AoE for 150% Health.

Name: Pumpkimp
Ability Description: Active: Casts fireball at current target, dealing 360% (MP) Magic DMG and inflicting 0.5% Burning and 15% Deep Wounds for 10s. If target already Burning, uses Pumpkin Fireball instead dealing 490% (MP) Magic DMG. Keywords: Burning: Receive True DMG = portion of Max Health/s. Deep Wounds: Healing received reduced.
Rank 1: Fireball DMG increases to 420% MP, and Pumpkin Fireball DMG increases to 555% MP.
Rank 2: Pumpkin Fireball will deal 20% bonus True DMG.
Rank 4: Fireball DMG increases to 480% MP, and Pumpkin Fireball DMG increases to 620% MP.
Rank 6: Regenerates 2 additional Energy when using Basic Attacks against opponents affected by Burning.

Name: Jerboranj
Ability Description: Active: Releases orange juice barrel that explodes on contact, dealing 100% (MP) Magic DMG within 1 hex and applying Tooth Decay for 5s. Keyword: Tooth Decay: Applies 10% MR Shred and deals 36% (MP) Magic DMG/s.
Rank 1: Magic DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 120% MP, and Magic DMG dealt by Tooth Decay increases to 45% MP.
Rank 2: Additionally applies 15% Deep Wounds to opponents affected by Tooth Decay.
Rank 4: Magic DMG dealt by the Active Skill increases to 140% MP, and Magic DMG dealt by Tooth Decay increases to 54% MP.
Rank 6: The duration of Tooth Decay is extended to 7s. If Tooth Decay is applied again during its duration, the Magic DMG multiplier stacks.

Name: Sootsie
Ability Description: Active: Waves glowstick, healing 4 times. Each heal restores 100% (MP) Health to itself and 50% (MP) to other allied units within 1 hex.
Rank 1: MP increases by 12%.
Rank 2: Healing increases up to 50% based on the target's missing Health.
Rank 4: Self-healing from the Active Skill increases to 140% MP.
Rank 6: Skill healing to other units increases to 70% MP.

Name: Broomba
Ability Description: First Strike: Leaps and delivers heavy strike, dealing 20% (HP) Magic DMG, gains 30% (HP) Shield for 5s. Keyword: First Strike: Used at start of battle.
Rank 1: Health increases by 12%.
Rank 2: The Shield granted by this Skill no longer expires after 5s.
Rank 4: The Shield granted by this Skill increases to 40%, and DMG dealt increases to 30%.
Rank 6: Additionally gain 25 bonus Armor and MR while the Shield from this Skill is active.

Name: Famishade
Ability Description: Active: Repeatedly throws knives and forks, dealing 8x65% (MP) Magic DMG to current target.
Rank 1: The DMG of each of the Active Skill's throws increases to 75%.
Rank 2: Gains 10% bonus Attack SPD after using its Active Skill. Stacks up to 3 times and lasts until the end of battle.
Rank 4: Active Skill DMG per throw increases to 85%, and Attack SPD bonus increases to 10%.
Rank 6: Gains Passive Skill: Famishade's Basic Attacks and each of the Active Skill's knife and fork throws deal 15% bonus Magic DMG.

Name: Hoggit
Ability Description: First Strike: Use once at start of battle. Initiates Pig Out towards apple macarons, Launches opponents hit for 0.8s. Active: Searches for apple macaron traces, initiates Pig Out. Every 3 uses of Pig Out, next becomes Lady's Dinner Defense. Passive: Does not use Basic Attacks, regenerates Energy through Gorging. 60% of Attack SPD changes converted to MP change. New food appears on empty hex within 4 hexes near furthest opponent. Keywords: Pig Out: Start charging towards apple macarons, dealing 170% (MP) Magic DMG within 1-hex AoE of endpoint. Lady's Dinner Defense: Super-charge towards apple macarons with spirit, dealing 250% (MP)Magic DMG within 1-hex AoE along path, Launching for 1.0s. Spirit continues to furthest opponent, dealing 250% (MP) Magic DMG. Gorging: Dives in and gluttonizes food, regenerating 5 Energy/s until Energy Cost met.
Rank 1: Pig Out's DMG increases to 205% MP and Lady's Dinner Defense's DMG increases to 285% MP.
Rank 2: Hoggit recovers 80% +5% Health after finishing Gorging.
Rank 4: Pig Out's DMG increases to 240% MP and Lady's Dinner Defense's DMG increases to 320% MP.
Rank 6: When the spirit continues charging, opponents hit by it are launched for 1s. While the spirit exists, Hoggit gains 20% DMG reduction.

Name: Fyrklor
Ability Description: Passive: After every 3 Basic Attacks, unleashes Dancing Flame once (considered Basic Attack). Keyword: Dancing Flame: Swings greatsword upward, dealing 270% (ATK) Physical DMG and Launching for 0.5s.
Rank 1: DMG dealt by Dancing Flame increases to 340%, and the Launch duration increases to 0.65s.
Rank 2: Dancing Flame additionally applies 0.5% Burning and 33% Deep Wounds to the target for 5s.
Rank 4: DMG dealt by Dancing Flame increases to 410%, and the Launch duration increases to 0.80s.
Rank 6: Additionally heals itself for 120% with Dancing Flame. When any opponent is Launched or Stunned, the Dominator will recover 3% Health.

Name: Seroplumanth
Ability Description: Active: Unleashes frost breath toward most opponents for 4s, expanding AoE to farthest over 1.5s. Deal 36% (MP) Magic DMG every 0.25s.
Rank 1: Increases the DMG dealt by each hit of the Active Skill's breath to 44%.
Rank 2: The Active Skill additionally applies Freeze to opponents hit at least 8 times for 2s.
Rank 4: Increases the DMG dealt by each hit of the Active Skill's breath to 52%.
Rank 6: Gain Passive Skill: Seroplumanth deals 30% increased DMG to Frozen opponents.

Name: Mesmerith
Ability Description: Active: Take flight and glide away, gaining 20% DMG reduction. Releases 18 Bloodbats toward up to 3 opponents (split evenly), each dealing 45% (ATK) Physical DMG. Each use increases total by 6, up to 30.
Rank 1: Each Bloodbot's DMG increases to 50% of Mesmerith's ATK.
Rank 2: Mesmerith gains a stack of Grudge after using its Active Skill.
Rank 4: Each Bloodbot's DMG increases to 55% of Mesmerith's ATK.
Rank 6: The base number and max number of Bloodbots released by Mesmerith increase by 6. And gain Passive Skill: Mesmerith gains a stack of Grudge each time it defeats an opponent.

Name: Atragasus
Ability Description:
Active: Spin twinblade, dealing 220% (ATK) Physical DMG within 1 hex. After using twice, next becomes Ink Stains All That Is. 
Ink Stains All That Is: Leaps into the air and dives where opponents densest, dealing 460% (ATK) Physical DMG within 1 hex upon landing. Gains 35% Attack SPD for 5s.
Rank 1: DMG dealt by spinning the twinblade and dive increases to 260% and 540% ATK respectively.
Rank 2: Upon landing from a dive, additionally Stuns opponents within 1 hex for 2s.
Rank 4: DMG dealt by spinning the twinblade and dive increases to 300% and 620% ATK respectively.
Rank 6: Gain Passive Skill: Reduces the Active Skill's Energy Cost by 20.

Name: Shampoco
Ability Description: Active: Fire bubble dealing 450% (MP) Magic DMG to current target, ricocheting to nearest opponent dealing 200% (MP) Magic DMG.
Rank 1: The bubble's initial Magic DMG increases to 540%, and the first ricochet's Magic DMG increases to 240%.
Rank 2: The bubble will ricochet back to the initial target, dealing 200% Magic DMG.
Rank 4: The bubble's initial Magic DMG increases to 630%, and the first ricochet's Magic DMG increases to 280%.
Rank 6: The first target hit by the bubble is Frozen for 2s, and the Magic DMG dealt by the second ricochet increases to 400%.

Name: Baggle
Ability Description: Active: Flaps ears, rises into air, increasing Attack SPD of allied unit with highest MP by 30% for 5s.
Rank 1: MP increases by 12%.
Rank 2: After using its Skill, the target immediately regenerates 20 Energy.
Rank 4: The Attack SPD bonus granted by the Skill increases to 50%.
Rank 6: The Skill affects Baggle at the same time.
